summary: Issue #468 P2-9-6 LIVE partition E2E: intent-review spec_fidelity=pass consumed as given. live_partition.py fetches A-29+A-28 for one calendar day, upserts shop rollup and optional per-session rows, skips completed partitions, respects call budget, forbids A-26/A-27 paths. Additive A-29 production-read allowlist. Seven unit tests pass with fixtures; no live Partner calls; mapping.py unchanged.

criticalFindings.description: A-28 interaction_performance.views summed into visitors column (ADR-029 shared schema has no separate views column on rollup).
criticalFindings.suggestion: Acceptable per issue derivations table; document if product later adds views column.
